comment: Golden search-regression fixture. Every search bug report gets a row BEFORE its fix is coded. Fields: query; mustBeTop1 (exact id); mustIncludeTop3 (ids that must all appear in the top 3); mustExcludeTop1 (id that must NOT rank first); snippetMatch (regex the named doc's snippet must match, format 'id:regex'); source (why the row exists).

rows.source: phrase bonus must survive stopword stripping
user report 2026-07-14: verb form returned 0 hits

rows.query: can an operator trade against its own customers

rows.source: corrected betting row targets reg-4, not trading
lay licence vocabulary; reg-4 guarded by the 'is a prediction market betting' row (schedule-3/reg-3 legitimately outrank it here — both are licence/gambling-dense)

rows.query: do I need a gambling licence

rows.source: 'cost' must not misdirect to appeal costs (reg-32)

rows.query: how long does an application take

rows.source: sanctions = AML/financial sanctions sense, not enforcement
synonym-only match must show statutory surface form
